description: DevLoopSession entity template — Represents a single invocation of the dev-loop from start to termination
_comment_session_id: Unique session identifier (devloop-{timestamp}-{hash}). Auto-generated on session creation.
_comment_feature_description: Natural language task description provided by user at invocation
_comment_branch: Git branch for autonomous work. MUST be set before first iteration. Agent restricted to this branch (no branch operations).
_comment_status: Current session state. State machine: pending -> running -> [paused <-> running]* -> complete | failed
_comment_current_phase: Current execution phase. Varies by scope_mode (tactic vs strategy).
_comment_iteration_count: Current iteration number (1-based). Increments each loop cycle. MUST be <= budget_limit.max_iterations
_comment_quality_grades: Array of QualityGrade references. Length MUST equal iteration_count. Each entry: {iteration: N, composite_grade: 0.XX, timestamp: ISO8601}
_comment_tribunal_ballots: Array of TribunalBallot references. Each entry: {ballot_id: string, round: enum, verdict: string}
_comment_termination_reason: Why the session ended. MUST be null when status = running | paused. MUST be set when status = complete | failed.
_comment_started_at: Session start timestamp (ISO8601). Set on session creation.
_comment_completed_at: Session completion timestamp (ISO8601). MUST be null when status != complete | failed.
_comment_scope_mode: Execution mode determined by scope detection. tactic = streamlined (plan->implement->test), strategy = full workflow (research->tribunal->specify->plan->implement->test)

budget_spent._comment: Cumulative resource consumption. Incremented each iteration. tokens MUST be <= budget_limit.tokens

budget_limit._comment: Hard circuit breakers (FR-025, FR-024). Session terminates immediately when any limit reached.

_comment_checkpoint_path: Path to resumable checkpoint file. Set on user interrupt or pause. Used for --resume flag.

config._comment_quality_threshold: Target composite grade for success (FR-016). Range: [0.80, 0.99]. Default: 0.95
config._comment_convergence_delta: Quality improvement threshold for convergence detection (FR-023). Loop exits when improvement < delta for convergence_window iterations.
config._comment_convergence_window: Number of consecutive iterations to check for convergence. Default: 3
config._comment_model_primary: Primary AI model for execution. Constitutional Principle XIV default.
config._comment_model_fallback: Fallback model when primary unavailable or for cost optimization.
config._comment_tribunal_models: Three independent models for tribunal voting (FR-006). Queries in parallel (FR-010).

quality_weights._comment: Weights for composite grade calculation (FR-015). test_pass_rate MUST be >= 0.30 (FR-014). Sum MUST = 1.0

config._comment_permission_level: Tiered permission model (FR-030). L0=read-only, L1=safe writes, L2=git commit + network, L3=git push + deploy (requires approval)

_comment_self_extension_plugins: Plugins created during this session via self-extension (FR-038-FR-042). Each entry: {plugin_name: string, quarantine_status: enum, created_at: ISO8601}
_comment_event_log_path: Path to append-only event stream (JSONL). All thoughts, actions, observations, decisions logged here (FR-043).

metadata._comment: Additional session metadata for auditing and debugging

_validation_rules: quality_grades array length MUST equal iteration_count
termination_reason MUST be null when status = running | paused
completed_at MUST be null when status != complete | failed
scope_mode MUST be set before first iteration (FR-034)
